content_fingerprint: accenture begins deploying microsoft 365 copilot to a workforce the size of denver microsoft and accenture are in the early phases of rolling out microsoft 365 copilot to accenture s roughly 750 000 employees globally with the partnership outlining a structured approach to managing the deployment at scale microsoft has confirmed that accenture is deploying microsoft 365 copilot across its global workforce of approximately 750 000 people a figure comparable to the population of denver colorado a dedicated post on the microsoft ai blog details how the two companies are approaching the rollout mi
